it.com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl
Class IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType

java.lang.Object
  junit.framework.Assert
      junit.framework.TestCase
          net.sourceforge.jwebunit.WebTestCase
              com.atlassian.jira.webtests.WebTestCaseWrapper
                  com.atlassian.jira.webtests.AbstractAtlassianWebTestCase
                      com.atlassian.jira.webtests.JIRAWebTest
                          it.com.atlassian.jira.issue.customfields.impl.IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.atlassian.jira.webtests.util.EnvironmentAware, junit.framework.Test
public class IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType
extends com.atlassian.jira.webtests.JIRAWebTest

Class used for integration testing for the JIRA Watcher Field Plugin. TODO Get integration testing on bulk change. TODO Check issue security

Author:
Ray Barham

          Checks filters/searching using the watcher field.

IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType

public IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType(String name)

Method Detail

setUp

public void setUp()

Overrides:
setUp in class com.atlassian.jira.webtests.JIRAWebTest

testAddWatcherField

public void testAddWatcherField()
Test adding a watcher field to JIRA.

testDeleteWatcherField

public void testDeleteWatcherField()
Test deleting a watcher field from JIRA.

testAddWatcherOnIssueCreate

public void testAddWatcherOnIssueCreate()
Test adding watchers via the watcher field on issue create.

testAddWatcherOnIssueEdit

public void testAddWatcherOnIssueEdit()
Test adding watchers via the watcher field on issue edit.

testModifyingWatcherOnIssueEdit

public void testModifyingWatcherOnIssueEdit()
Test modifying watchers via the watcher field.

testConfigureWatcherField

public void testConfigureWatcherField()
Test configuring the watcher field.

testFiltersByWatcher

public void testFiltersByWatcher()
Checks filters/searching using the watcher field. Also checks that issues are being re-indexed on adding watchers (otherwise, searches would not work).

testChangeHistory

public void testChangeHistory()
Checks that change history is effected properly. See issue JWF-5.

testEditWatcherOnIssueTransition

public void testEditWatcherOnIssueTransition()
Checks that watchers are edited properly on issue transition. See issue JWF-4.
